TRAINABLE_PATIENT_LEVEL.meaning: Patient/sample-level data with usable clinical or molecular fields.

KNOWLEDGE_EVIDENCE.meaning: Curated evidence knowledgebase or guideline/trial evidence. Not patient training data.

REGIONAL_PREVALENCE_CONTEXT.meaning: Country/region-level EGFR prevalence or cohort summary without downloadable patient-level rows.

CONTROLLED_ACCESS_REQUIRED.meaning: Potentially valuable source but cannot be used until official access/terms are completed.

DO_NOT_USE.meaning: No reliable source, unclear legality, non-traceable, duplicate/fabricated, or unsupported data.
examples: AI-generated patients pretending to be real

PROXY_PENDING_VALIDATION.meaning: Model-derived or rule-derived proxy clearly labeled as non-clinically validated.
examples: mutation-derived pathway proxy pending CPTAC phosphoproteomics validation
